{{Quote|What the— It's a Wookiee attacking Berl!|A stormtrooper aboard the ''Tarkin''|<ref name="marvel52" />}}
'''Berl''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] stationed aboard the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. He confronted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] as they were attempting to sabotage the ''Tarkin''{{'s}} [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] generator. Berl threatened the droids only for their [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] friend [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to approach him from behind, pick him up and toss him into the generator, destroying it and killing the trooper.<ref name="marvel52" />
